title: note2midi
description: convert note name to MIDI pitch

messages.description: note name to convert to MIDI pitch

body: [note2midi] converts note names (such as 'C4') to MIDI pitch values. All enharmonic names are included (even unusual ones like Cb and double sharps/flats). It takes symbols, lists or anythings that end with an octave number, in a way that C4 represents middle C (MIDI pitch = 60). Range is from C0 to B8.
